styles.css: .site-header{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;background:var(--wp--preset--color--orange);border-bottom:1px solid var(--wp--preset--color--orange-dark);box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(255,165,0,.25)}.footer.section-bordered{padding:72px 0 38px}.section-bordered{border-top:1px solid var(--wp--preset--color--orange-dark)}.cta{color:var(--wp--preset--color--text)}.cta-inner{text-align:center;max-width:900px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}.cta-inner .wp-block-heading,.cta-inner .wp-block-paragraph{margin-top:0;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}.cta .section-title{margin-bottom:24px;color:var(--wp--preset--color--text)}.cta .section-kicker{margin-bottom:32px;color:var(--wp--preset--color--text-secondary)}.cta-actions{margin-bottom:86px}.cta .button-row,.cta .wp-block-buttons.button-row{margin:0}.cta .button-row .wp-block-button{margin:0}.cta .button-row .is-style-header-primary .wp-block-button__link{min-width:84px;height:48px;padding:0 22px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;line-height:1;border:1px solid var(--wp--preset--color--text);border-radius:var(--wp--custom--radius--md);background:var(--wp--preset--color--text);color:var(--wp--preset--color--text-inverse);box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(28,25,23,.15);transition:background .2s ease,border-color .2s ease,color .2s ease,box-shadow .28s ease,transform .2s ease}.cta .button-row .is-style-header-primary .wp-block-button__link:hover{background:var(--wp--preset--color--stone-600);border-color:var(--wp--preset--color--stone-600);color:var(--wp--preset--color--text-inverse);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(28,25,23,.2);transform:translateY(-1px)}.cta .button-row .is-style-outline .wp-block-button__link{background:transparent;border-color:var(--wp--preset--color--text);color:var(--wp--preset--color--text);box-shadow:none}.cta .button-row .is-style-outline .wp-block-button__link:hover{background:rgba(28,25,23,.06);border-color:var(--wp--preset--color--text);color:var(--wp--preset--color--text);box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(28,25,23,.1);transform:translateY(-1px)}.logo-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:28px;flex-wrap:wrap}.logo-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;white-space:nowrap;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:var(--wp--preset--color--text)}.logo-item p{margin:0}.webflow-mark{width:32px;height:20px;background:var(--wp--preset--color--orange);clip-path:polygon(0 68%,17% 30%,32% 30%,26% 47%,43% 30%,57% 30%,48% 68%,64% 30%,100% 30%,84% 68%);margin:0;padding:0;flex-shrink:0}.relume-mark{width:29px;height:29px;border:5px solid var(--wp--preset--color--orange);transform:rotate(30deg);border-radius:4px;margin:0;padding:0;flex-shrink:0}.cta .webflow-mark{background:var(--wp--preset--color--text)}.cta .relume-mark{border-color:var(--wp--preset--color--text)}.footer-nav h3{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:26px}.footer-brand{color:var(--wp--preset--color--stone-400)}.footer a{color:var(--wp--preset--color--stone-200);transition:color .2s ease}.footer a:hover{color:var(--wp--preset--color--kahel-200)}.footer-bottom{border-top:1px solid var(--wp--preset--color--stone-600);padding-top:32px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:40px;font-size:12px;color:var(--wp--preset--color--stone-400)}.section-label{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:22px;color:var(--wp--preset--color--brand);text-transform:uppercase}.section-title{font-size:clamp(44px,4vw,60px);line-height:1.05;letter-spacing:-.03em;font-weight:800}.section-kicker{font-size:16px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--wp--preset--color--text-muted)}.button-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}.hero-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(280px,2fr) 2fr 1fr;gap:40px;align-items:start}.hero-copy{min-height:620px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between}.hero-copy-top .section-label{margin-bottom:22px}.hero-title{max-width:100%}.hero-text{max-width:100%}.hero-text p{margin-bottom:28px}.hero-image-large{height:620px;border-radius:var(--wp--custom--radius--md);overflow:hidden}.hero-image-large .wp-block-image,.hero-image-large figure{margin:0;height:100%}.hero-image-large img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;border-radius:var(--wp--custom--radius--md)}.hero-images-stack{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:40px;height:620px}.hero-image-small{flex:1;min-height:0;border-radius:var(--wp--custom--radius--md);overflow:hidden}.hero-image-small .wp-block-image,.hero-image-small figure{margin:0;height:100%}.hero-image-small img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;border-radius:var(--wp--custom--radius--md)}.image-placeholder{background:var(--wp--preset--color--stone-100);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}.placeholder-icon{width:116px;height:88px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--wp--preset--color--stone-200);position:relative;opacity:.85}.placeholder-icon:before{content:"";position:absolute;left:24px;top:42px;width:38px;height:28px;background:var(--wp--preset--color--stone-100);clip-path:polygon(0 100%,45% 20%,72% 70%,100% 35%,100% 100%)}.placeholder-icon:after{content:"";position:absolute;left:32px;top:22px;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--wp--preset--color--stone-100)}.placeholder-icon-sm{width:72px;height:54px;border-radius:7px}.placeholder-icon-sm:before{left:15px;top:26px;width:25px;height:18px}.placeholder-icon-sm:after{left:21px;top:14px;width:11px;height:11px}.site-header .header-shell,.footer .footer-shell{width:100%}.site-header .header-bar{width:100%;height:82px;min-height:82px;max-height:82px;align-items:center;box-sizing:border-box;margin:0}.site-header .header-bar>*{margin-block:0}.site-header .header-bar>.wp-block-site-logo{flex-shrink:0;margin:0}.site-header .header-bar>.wp-block-site-logo img{max-height:48px;width:auto;display:block}.site-header .header-bar>.wp-block-navigation{flex:1;justify-content:center;margin:0}.site-header .header-bar>.wp-block-navigation .wp-block-navigation-item__content{min-height:82px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:600}.site-header .header-actions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:22px;flex-shrink:0;margin:0}.site-header .header-actions .wp-block-buttons{margin:0}.site-header .header-login{margin:0}.site-header .header-login a{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--wp--preset--color--text);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s ease}.site-header .header-login a:hover{color:var(--wp--preset--color--text-secondary)}.site-header .is-style-header-primary .wp-block-button__link{min-width:84px;height:48px;padding:0 22px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;line-height:1;border:1px solid var(--wp--preset--color--text);border-radius:var(--wp--custom--radius--md);background:var(--wp--preset--color--text);color:var(--wp--preset--color--text-inverse);box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(28,25,23,.15);transition:background .2s ease,border-color .2s ease,color .2s ease,box-shadow .28s ease,transform .2s ease}.site-header .is-style-header-primary .wp-block-button__link:hover{background:var(--wp--preset--color--stone-600);border-color:var(--wp--preset--color--stone-600);color:var(--wp--preset--color--text-inverse);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(28,25,23,.2);transform:translateY(-1px)}.site-header .wp-block-navigation .wp-block-navigation__responsive-container-open{align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:42px;height:42px;border:1px solid var(--wp--preset--color--text);border-radius:var(--wp--custom--radius--md);padding:0}.site-header .wp-block-navigation .wp-block-navigation__responsive-container-open svg{fill:var(--wp--preset--color--text)}.origin-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:start}.origin-image{height:535px;border-radius:var(--wp--custom--radius--md);overflow:hidden}.origin-image .wp-block-image,.origin-image figure{margin:0;height:100%}.origin-image img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;border-radius:var(--wp--custom--radius--md)}.origin-content{align-self:center;max-width:560px}.origin-content .section-label{margin-bottom:22px}.origin-content .section-title{margin-bottom:28px}.origin-content .section-kicker{margin-bottom:36px;max-width:540px}.origin-logos{margin-bottom:42px}.origin-logos .logo-item{font-size:18px}.origin .button-row{align-items:center;margin:0}.origin .button-row .wp-block-buttons{margin:0}.origin .button-row .wp-block-button{margin:0}.origin .button-row .is-style-outline .wp-block-button__link{min-width:84px;height:48px;padding:0 22px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;line-height:1;border-radius:var(--wp--custom--radius--md);border:1px solid var(--wp--preset--color--orange);background:transparent;color:var(--wp--preset--color--orange);box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(255,165,0,.08)}.origin .button-row .is-style-outline .wp-block-button__link:hover{background:var(--wp--preset--color--kahel-50);border-color:var(--wp--preset--color--orange-dark);color:var(--wp--preset--color--orange-dark);box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(255,165,0,.18);transform:translateY(-1px)}.text-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--wp--preset--color--brand);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s ease,gap .28s ease}.text-link:hover{color:var(--wp--preset--color--orange-deep);gap:18px}.text-link span{display:inline-block;transition:transform .28s ease}.text-link:hover span{transform:translateX(3px)}.testimonial{text-align:center}.testimonial-inner{max-width:700px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}.testimonial-logo{justify-content:center;margin-bottom:42px}.testimonial-quote,.wp-block-quote.testimonial-quote{font-size:24px;line-height:1.3;letter-spacing:-.02em;font-weight:700;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto 34px;border:none;padding:0}.testimonial-quote p,.wp-block-quote.testimonial-quote p{margin:0}.testimonial .author-avatar{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--wp--preset--color--kahel-200);margin:0 auto 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}.testimonial .author-avatar span{width:10px;height:10px;border:2px solid var(--wp--preset--color--orange);border-radius:2px}.testimonial .author-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin:0 0 4px}.testimonial .author-role{font-size:12px;color:var(--wp--preset--color--text-muted);margin:0}.section-heading-center{max-width:760px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;text-align:center}.section-heading-center .section-title{margin-bottom:28px}.section-heading-center .section-kicker{max-width:520px;margin:0 auto}.stories .wp-block-post-template.story-grid,.stories ul.story-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:30px;list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0 0 74px}.story-card{border-radius:var(--wp--custom--radius--md);transition:transform .28s ease,box-shadow .28s ease}.story-card:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(28,25,23,.08)}.story-image{height:240px;margin-bottom:22px;border-radius:var(--wp--custom--radius--md);overflow:hidden;transition:box-shadow .28s ease}.story-card:hover .story-image{box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(28,25,23,.1)}.story-image .wp-block-post-featured-image,.story-image figure{margin:0;height:100%}.story-image img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;border-radius:var(--wp--custom--radius--md)}.story-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:18px}.story-meta .wp-block-post-terms{margin:0}.story-meta .wp-block-post-terms a{background:var(--wp--preset--color--kahel-100);color:var(--wp--preset--color--orange-deep);padding:6px .wp-block-post-time-to-read{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin:0;color:var(--wp--preset--color--text)}.story-title{font-size:24px;line-height:1.15;letter-spacing:-.02em;font-weight:700;margin:0 0 16px}.story-title a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}.story-text,.story-text p{font-size:14px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--wp--preset--color--text-muted);margin:0 0 26px}.stories .wp-block-read-more.text-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--wp--preset--color--brand);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s ease,gap .28s ease}.stories .wp-block-read-more.text-link:hover{color:var(--wp--preset--color--orange-deep);gap:18px}.center-action{display:flex;justify-content:center;margin:0}.stories .center-action .wp-block-button__link:hover{background:var(--wp--preset--color--kahel-50);border-color:var(--wp--preset--color--orange-dark);color:var(--wp--preset--color--orange-dark);box-shadow:0 4px 14px .wp-block-post-template.story-grid,.stories
